title: Spicy Shrimp Ramen
description: A spicy and savory bowl of ramen noodles topped with succulent shrimp and vegetables. Perfect for a quick and delicious meal.
instructions: Cook ramen noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tsp of sesame oil over medium heat.
Add sliced carrots and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add sliced bok choy and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add cooked ramen noodles to the skillet and stir to combine.
In a small bowl, whisk together molten soy sauce, Japanese rice vinegar, and Monsoon Japanese chili flakes.
Pour the sauce over the noodles and vegetables, and stir to combine.
Add cooked shrimp to the skillet and stir to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced green onions.
